statusLine.command: input=$(cat); user=$(whoami); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir' | sed "s|$HOME|~|g"); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); time=$(date +%H:%M); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); transcript=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.transcript_path'); todo_count=$([ -f "$transcript" ] && grep -c '"type":"todo"' "$transcript" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); cost=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // empty'); lines_added=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_lines_added // empty'); lines_removed=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_lines_removed // empty'); duration_ms=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_duration_ms // empty'); cd "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')" 2>/dev/null; branch=$(git --no-optional-locks rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo ''); status=''; [ -n "$branch" ] && { [ -n "$(git --no-optional-locks status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && status='*'; }; B='\033[38;2;30;102;245m'; G='\033[38;2;64;160;43m'; Y='\033[38;2;223;142;29m'; M='\033[38;2;136;57;239m'; C='\033[38;2;23;146;153m'; R='\033[0m'; T='\033[38;2;76;79;105m'; Rd='\033[38;2;210;77;77m'; printf "${C}${user}${R}:${B}${cwd}${R}"; [ -n "$branch" ] && printf " ${G}${branch}${Y}${status}${R}"; [ -n "$remaining" ] && printf " ${M}ctx:${remaining}%%${R}"; printf " ${T}${model}${R} ${Y}${time}${R}"; [ -n "$cost" ] && printf " ${C}\$%.2f${R}" "$cost"; { [ -n "$lines_added" ] || [ -n "$lines_removed" ]; } && { la=${lines_added:-0}; lr=${lines_removed:-0}; printf " ${G}+${la}${R}/${Rd}-${lr}${R}"; }; [ -n "$duration_ms" ] && { ds=$((duration_ms / 1000)); dm=$((ds / 60)); dh=$((dm / 60)); if [ "$dh" -gt 0 ]; then drm=$((dm % 60)); printf " ${T}${dh}h${drm}m${R}"; else printf " ${T}${dm}m${R}"; fi; }; [ "$todo_count" -gt 0 ] && printf " ${C}todos:${todo_count}${R}"; echo
